general.languageDescription: Choose the display language for the application.
general.dateFormatDescription: Choose how dates are displayed throughout the application.

backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.description: Create a backup of your library or restore from a previous backup.
backup.createBackupDescription: Save all tracks, playlists, tags, and discovery releases to a backup file.
backup.restoreFromBackupDescription: Replace your current library with data from a backup file.
backup.restoreWarning: This will replace all current library data including tracks, playlists, tags, and discovery releases. This action cannot be undone.
backup.backupContents: This backup contains {tracks, plural, =0 {no tracks} =1 {1 track} other {{tracks} tracks}}, {playlists, plural, =0 {no playlists} =1 {1 playlist} other {{playlists} playlists}}, {tags, plural, =0 {no tags} =1 {1 tag} other {{tags} tags}}, and {discoveryReleases, plural, =0 {no discovery releases} =1 {1 discovery release} other {{discoveryReleases} discovery releases}}. Created on {date}.

library.keyNotationDescription: Choose how musical keys are displayed.
library.autoAnalyzeOnImportDescription: Automatically analyze BPM and key when importing tracks.
library.syncDescription: Configure automatic synchronization with USB devices.
library.autoSyncOnConnectDescription: When a USB device reconnects, automatically sync any pending changes.
library.autoSyncOnChangeDescription: When tracks or playlists are edited, automatically sync to connected devices.
library.ignoredDevicesDescription: Devices in this list are hidden from the sidebar and will not trigger auto-sync.
library.exportFormatDescription: Choose the database format for USB exports.

discovery.autoFetchMetadataDescription: Automatically fetch release metadata when adding a URL.
discovery.transferTagsOnImportDescription: Transfer release tags to imported tracks by default.
discovery.removeReleaseAfterImportDescription: Automatically remove releases from discovery after importing files.
discovery.previewCacheDescription: Previewed discovery tracks are cached locally for instant playback on subsequent listens.
discovery.clearCacheConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to clear all cached preview audio?
discovery.clearCacheWarning: Previously previewed tracks will need to be re-streamed from their source on next play. This may be slower and some streams may no longer be available.

appearance.fontDescription: Choose the font used throughout the application.

sound.outputDeviceDescription: Select the audio output device for playback.
sound.continuousPlaybackDescription: Automatically play the next track when the current one ends.

diagnostics.exportDescription: Export diagnostics report for bug reports or troubleshooting.

player.trackNotFound: Could not locate the playing track

library.dragDropHint: Press {shortcut} or drag audio files here to import them

discovery.addReleaseHint: Press {shortcut} to add releases from Bandcamp, Discogs, YouTube, and more
discovery.previewNotAvailable: Preview not available for this source
discovery.fetchError: Could not fetch metadata from this URL
discovery.matchFound: This track is part of {albumTitle} which is already in your discovery list
discovery.similarFound: A similar release already exists: {title} by {artist}

bulkImport.alreadyInDiscovery: {count, plural, =1 {1 already in discovery} other {{count} already in discovery}}
bulkImport.completedWithFailures: Added {succeeded, plural, =1 {1 release} other {{succeeded} releases}} ({failed} failed)
bulkImport.noReleasesFound: No releases found on this page

confirm.deletePlaylistMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this playlist?
confirm.deleteFolderMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this folder?
confirm.deleteFolderWarning: This folder contains playlists that will also be deleted.
confirm.deleteItemsMessage: {count, plural, =1 {Are you sure you want to delete this item?} other {Are you sure you want to delete {count} items?}}
confirm.deleteItemsBulkFolderWarning: Selection includes folders that contain playlists which will also be deleted.
confirm.deleteTagMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this tag? It will be removed from all tracks.
confirm.deleteCategoryMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this category? All tags in this category will be removed from all tracks.
confirm.removeFromPlaylistMessage: {count, plural, =1 {Remove this track from the playlist?} other {Remove {count} tracks from the playlist?}}
confirm.removeFromLibraryMessage: {count, plural, =1 {Remove this track from your library?} other {Remove {count} tracks from your library?}}
confirm.removeFromLibraryWarning: This action cannot be undone. Tracks will be removed from all playlists.
confirm.deleteTracksFromCollection: Also delete tracks from my collection
confirm.removeDiscoveryReleasesMessage: {count, plural, =1 {Remove this release from discovery?} other {Remove {count} releases from discovery?}}
confirm.removeDiscoveryReleasesWarning: This action cannot be undone. Releases will be removed from all playlists.
confirm.removeDiscoveryReleasesFromPlaylistMessa: {count, plural, =1 {Remove this release from the playlist?} other {Remove {count} releases from the playlist?}}
confirm.deleteReleasesFromCollection: Also delete releases from my collection

relocate.title: Relocate Track
relocate.message: Select the new location for this track.

duplicate.title: Duplicate Track Detected
duplicate.message: This file matches an existing track in your library:
duplicate.skipDescription: Don't import this file. Keep the existing track unchanged.
duplicate.updatePathDescription: Keep all existing data (cue points, tags, playlists, play history) but update the file location.
duplicate.replaceDescription: Fresh import from new file. Keeps playlist memberships only. Resets cue points, tags, and play history.

conflict.title: Name Conflict
conflict.message: A {type} named "{name}" already exists in this location.
conflict.mergeFolder: Move contents of this folder into the existing folder. You'll be prompted for any nested conflicts.
conflict.mergePlaylist: Combine tracks from both playlists into one.
conflict.mergeNotAvailable: Not available: both items must be the same type to merge.
conflict.replaceDescription: Delete the existing {type} and move this {item} in its place.
conflict.replaceNotAvailable: Not available: can only replace items of the same type.
conflict.replaceFolderWarning: Replacing will permanently delete the existing folder and all its contents.
conflict.replacePlaylistWarning: Replacing will permanently delete the existing playlist and its track associations.

toast.trackAdded: {count, plural, =1 {1 track} other {{count} tracks}} added to {playlistName}
toast.trackAddedWithFailed: {count, plural, =1 {1 track} other {{count} tracks}} added to {playlistName}, {failed} failed
toast.tracksImportedWithSkipped: {imported, plural, =1 {1 track} other {{imported} tracks}} imported, {skipped} skipped
toast.tracksExported: {exported, plural, =1 {1 track} other {{exported} tracks}} exported to {deviceName}, {skipped, plural, =1 {1 skipped} other {{skipped} skipped}}
toast.trackRemoved: {count, plural, =1 {1 track} other {{count} tracks}} removed from playlist
toast.trackRemovedFromLibrary: {count, plural, =1 {1 track} other {{count} tracks}} removed from library
toast.failedToAddPlaylist: Failed to add tracks to playlist
toast.warningTracksImportedFailed: Tracks imported but failed to add to {playlistName}
toast.noArtworkInFile: No artwork found in audio file

errors.cannotDropIntoSelf: Cannot drop a folder into itself
errors.cannotDropIntoSubfolder: Cannot drop a folder into its own subfolder
errors.tagNameConflict: A tag with this name already exists in the target category

reformat.title: Reformat Device
reformat.warning: All data will be permanently deleted
reformat.warningDetails: Reformatting "{deviceName}" will erase all files on this device. This action cannot be undone.

export.title: Export to Device
export.selectPlaylistsDescription: Choose which playlists to export to the selected devices.
export.selectDevicesDescription: Select one or more devices to export to.
export.devicesSelected: {count, plural, =1 {1 device selected} other {{count} devices selected}}
export.whatToDo: What would you like to do?
export.filesCopiedBeforeFailure: {count, plural, =1 {1 file was copied} other {{count} files were copied}} before the failure.
export.noPlaylistsInFolder: No playlists to export in this folder
export.checkpointAvailable: A previous export can be resumed
export.tracksCompleted: {count, plural, =1 {1 track completed} other {{count} tracks completed}}
export.filesRemaining: {count, plural, =1 {1 file remaining} other {{count} files remaining}}

dates.daysAgo: {count, plural, =1 {1 day ago} other {{count} days ago}}
dates.weeksAgo: {count, plural, =1 {1 week ago} other {{count} weeks ago}}
dates.monthsAgo: {count, plural, =1 {1 month ago} other {{count} months ago}}
dates.yearsAgo: {count, plural, =1 {1 year ago} other {{count} years ago}}

crash.title: Something went wrong
crash.description: The application encountered an unexpected error.

welcome.title: Welcome to {appName}
welcome.subtitle: One place to manage your DJ library and discover music. Let's personalize your experience before you start curating.

language.description: Select the language for the application interface.
